task_description: Add query result streaming so answers are delivered token-by-token instead of waiting for the full response

entries.description: answer_stream() replicates all pipeline steps, calls generate_stream() at the end which wraps chat_stream(). All RAG context preserved.
answer_stream() replicates pipeline, calls self._chat.chat_stream() at the final step instead of going through synthesizer. Loses synthesis logic but keeps RAG.
Calls chat_stream() directly, skipping the entire pipeline. No RAG, no context, no guardrails.
Calls answer() then splits answer.text into fake tokens. Not real streaming.

entries.pattern: Full pipeline, yield, correct return type
entries.description: Full pipeline replication with yield statements and correct return type (Iterator/Generator).

entries.pattern: Full pipeline, yield, wrong return type
entries.description: Full pipeline with yield but returns Answer object instead of Iterator.
Missing some pipeline steps (e.g., guardrails, retrieval) but has yield.
No pipeline replication, calls chat_stream directly.
Returns Answer object, no yield — blocking, not streaming.
Raises NotImplementedError or file not present in plan.
Uses StreamingResponse with async generator wrapper, references correct request model fields.
StreamingResponse present but uses fabricated request fields (F2/F25 pattern).
StreamingResponse present but calls non-existent service layer methods.
Returns a regular JSON response, not a streaming response.
Uses sys.stdout.flush for streaming — wrong approach for web API.
Implements generate_stream() that wraps the underlying chat provider's streaming interface.
File present with streaming method stub that raises NotImplementedError.
Synthesizer not included in plan artifacts.
